# SC Viking
> Children's football academy in Bucharest, Romania. Founded 2021.

## About
SC Viking is a children's football academy based in Bucharest, Romania, founded in 2021. The club trains children aged 4 to 14 across three age groups (4-7, 8-11, 12-14), with training sessions three times per week at an indoor arena. SC Viking competes in official AMFB (Bucharest Football Association) championships and Stelele Viitorului București tournaments. Groups are limited to 8-12 children to ensure individual coaching attention.

## Coach
Head coach Rostyslav holds a UEFA C licence. He provides specific, actionable feedback at every session. The coaching philosophy: "Football is learning. Winning is the outcome."

## Training
- Three sessions per week
- Friendly matches every week
- Official championship games every two weeks
- Indoor arena in Bucharest

## Age Groups
- 4-7 years: Focus on play and basic coordination
- 8-11 years: Technical development and teamwork
- 12-14 years: Tactical awareness and competition
